title: GitHubAuthHealthField
description: Shape of the `githubAuth` field added to the orchestrator `/health` response by issue #762.

status.description: Per-credential authentication health. `unknown` = no monitor call recorded yet; `ok` = last call succeeded; `failing` = at least one HTTP 401 since the last success.

consecutiveFailures.description: Count of consecutive HTTP 401 results since the last success for this credential. 0 when status is `ok` or `unknown`.

lastSuccessAt.description: Timestamp of the last successful GitHub call using this credential. Omitted when status is `unknown` and never present without a prior success.

credentialId.description: Identifier of the credential whose health is being reported. Omitted only when no credentials are known.

expiresAt.description: Mirror of `expiresAt` from `.agency/credentials.yaml` for the surfaced credential. Optional; absent when the credential YAML did not include an expiry.
